headline: Nasdaq Stock Outlook: Is Wall Street Bullish or Bearish?
summary: Nasdaq has underperformed the broader market over the past year, but analysts are highly optimistic about the stock’s prospects.

headline: AI Is Complementary To Crypto, Will Accelerate Adoption, Bitget CEO Says
summary: Artificial intelligence is complementing crypto rather than competing with it, according to Bitget CEO Gracy Chen.

headline: Is Nasdaq (NDAQ) Fairly Priced After Recent Pullback And AI Partnership Hopes?
summary: If you are wondering whether Nasdaq at US$88.48 is offering fair value or a potential mispricing, the starting point is to understand what the recent share performance and fundamentals are actually telling you. The stock is down 3.1% over the past week, up 6.4% over the past month, down 8.5% year to date, and up 10.9% over the past year, with longer term gains of 67.3% over three years and 73.5% over five years. These figures provide important context before judging the current price. Recent...
